Here's a reminder of what your ticket was about: ---------------------------------------------- Alice, Sep 30, 2025, 9:11 PM PDT Hi Gedam, I hope this email finds you well. Thank you for reaching out to Twilio Support, my name is Alice. I'm sorry to hear you're experiencing issues accessing your account and understand this can be frustrating. Rest assured, I am here to help you access your account. I found you have an existing Twilio SendGrid account linked to your email. Please note that your username will be your **email address** when you log in. **If you're having trouble logging in:** You can access your account via our SendGrid login page by entering your email address as a your username. This will redirect you to finish your login on our Twilio login page. If you need to reset your password, just click "forgot password" after entering your email address. **If you're having trouble accepting a SendGrid account invitation:** 1. Ask your colleague to resend the SendGrid account invitation (if it's since expired). 2. Go to your email and accept the invitation. 3. When you hit the Twilio signup page, please scroll down a bit select the **Log In** option under the Continue button. ![](https://support.twilio.com/attachments/token/xHniCYocHEjngGrFTGEAloqjG/?name=log-in-button.png) Furthermore, I truly understand how important this issue is to you, and I want to ensure we resolve it as quickly as possible. Rest assured, you'll receive friendly reminders along the way to keep us on track. Your satisfaction is our top priority, so don't hesitate to reach out with any questions or updates.
